twitter_thread: Spent 6 months testing 27 AI tools. Only 3 drove real ROI: Zapier, spaCy, and Google's AI sheets.
Zapier automates 120 email follow-ups/month for my business, saving 10 hours of staff time.
Named Entity Recognition in spaCy cut our data cleaning time from 20 to 8 hours/week.
AI writing tools generated 50 articles, but only 2 were publishable without heavy editing.
Google's AI sheets analyzed 500k rows of customer data, revealing a 25% sales pattern.
75% of customers who interacted with our AI chatbot still needed human support.
What's the one AI tool that's saved you the most time or money in your business?
pack.linkedin: After testing 27 AI tools, I found only 3 drove real ROI: Zapier, spaCy, and Google's AI sheets. Zapier automates 120 email follow-ups/month, saving 10 hours of staff time. Named Entity Recognition in spaCy cut data cleaning time from 20 to 8 hours/week. In contrast, AI writing tools struggled to produce publishable content. Google's AI sheets analyzed 500k rows of customer data, revealing a 25% sales pattern. However, 75% of customers who interacted with our AI chatbot still needed human support. What are your experiences with AI tools, and which ones have delivered tangible results for your business?
